architectural_purpose: deterministic descriptive transition intelligence aggregation without transition execution

classification_semantics.aggregated: all required transition intelligence domains and deterministic evidence are present
classification_semantics.blocked: governance, integrity, or execution-boundary preservation blocks aggregation
classification_semantics.incomplete: required domains, evidence, provenance, continuity, or explainability are missing
classification_semantics.partially_aggregated: some required domains exist while aggregation guarantees remain visibly incomplete
classification_semantics.prohibited: requested aggregation behavior violates non-execution or non-selection boundaries
classification_semantics.unaggregated: aggregation cannot be safely constructed under current deterministic coverage
classification_semantics.unknown: aggregation semantics, provenance meaning, continuity meaning, or evidence meaning is uncertain
classification_semantics.unsupported: aggregation domain or evidence is outside supported deterministic scope

explicit_limitations: v3.9 Phase 7 transition intelligence aggregation is non-executable
v3.9 Phase 7 does not enable orchestration execution
v3.9 Phase 7 does not enable transition execution
v3.9 Phase 7 does not enable graph traversal
v3.9 Phase 7 does not enable routing, scheduling, or dispatch
v3.9 Phase 7 does not enable runtime orchestration engines
v3.9 Phase 7 does not enable runtime mutation
v3.9 Phase 7 does not enable authorization or approval systems
v3.9 Phase 7 does not enable optimization or recommendations
v3.9 Phase 7 does not enable ranking, scoring, or selection
v3.9 Phase 7 does not prioritize or weight outcomes
v3.9 Phase 7 does not imply approval or preferred outcomes
v3.9 Phase 7 does not enable production behavior
